endpoint: MCP tool scan_trade_calls + Streamable-HTTP /mcp + POST /x402 (not listed — free tool)
forbidden_keys_note: outcome_return_pct / outcome_price are INTERNAL-only (Data Integrity LAW). Scan items carry no price/indicators/reasoning v1 — agents deep-dive via get_trade_call.

quota_exhausted.note: Free tier over monthly quota → blocked at entry, no scan, no charge. x402/internal tiers never exhaust (Infinity).

error_contract.tool_error: Unhandled errors surface via toolErrorContent (isError:true, structured text).

quota_contract.units_charged: max(1, non-HOLD calls in returned calls[])
quota_contract.note: Extends the get_trade_call HOLDs-are-free law to batch shape via the C1 trackCall(license, units) seam. includeHolds rows never add to the charge.

cache_contract.partial_semantics: partial:true when the deadline elapses before every cell scores; calls[] holds whatever completed. Per-coin promise coalescing; smaller topN sliced from the snapshot, larger topN tops up only missing coins. Stale universe served on fetch error.
cache_contract.scan_cells_internal: Cells score via getTradeSignal({internal:true}) — never touch the per-coin quota counter or the performance-db track record (preserves the on-chain ↔ dashboard equality canary).

consumers: MCP clients (Claude Desktop / Code / Cursor / Cline via tools/list)
drift_check_command: curl -s -X POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"scan_trade_calls","arguments":{"topN":10,"exchange":"BINANCE","timeframe":"15m"}}}' | jq -r '.result.content[0].text' | jq 'keys, (.calls[0]|keys), (._algovault|keys)' && echo '--- forbidden-key scan (expect empty) ---' && curl -s ... | grep -oE '"(outcome_return_pct|outcome_price|price_at_signal)"\s*:' || echo 'OK: no forbidden keys'
